rationale: Enterprise B2B SaaS for accountants requires absolute trust, clarity, and authority. The generic purple gradients feel like a template. We use Deep Obsidian with stark white high-contrast elements to convey precision and performance.

layout.general: Generous padding. Containers use p-8 to p-12.
layout.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large impactful typography (text-5xl to text-6xl+). No centered text by default. Use 'dashboard_preview' image as a floating element or right column.
layout.features: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Use border-collapse style: parent has border-t border-l, children have border-r border-b. p-8 inside children.
layout.how_it_works: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). Mix span sizes (e.g., col-span-4 row-span-2).
layout.login_form: Minimalist 'Neumorphism / Clay' or Flat solid surface. 1px border. No heavy drop shadows. High contrast inputs.

surfaces.header: Solid background bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-md with 1px border-b border-white/10.
surfaces.cards: Flat background bg-[#141414], 1px border border-white/10, no shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm).

components.buttons: Flat, sharp (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Primary CTA is bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200. No purple gradients.
components.inputs: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white rounded-none h-12 text-white placeholder-neutral-500
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular) instead of Lucide if possible, or keep Lucide but style them with stark white or #A1A1AA.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Cabinet Grotesk' font in index.css and tailwind config. Use it for ALL headings.
Apply Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Background must be #0A0A0A.
Design the Hero section with an asymmetrical, brutalist-leaning layout. Include the 'dashboard_preview' image with an opacity overlay or border.
Implement the Features section using the 'Grid Borders' technique (exposed skeleton, border-collapse feel).
Implement the How It Works section as a Bento grid.
Implement the Login Section as a high-contrast, clean form with sharp borders. Ensure 'remember me' and 'forgot password' links are styled.
Primary CTAs must be pure white background with black text.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
